source_description: Sanitized JSON search API response. Designed to exercise JSONPath features: root/descendant access ($.results[*]), array indexing ($.results[0]), slice expressions ($.results[0:2]), wildcard fields ($.results[*].title), nested objects ($.results[*].meta.year), and future filter expressions ($.results[?(@.meta.rating>4.0)]). Includes a facets object for union/recursive-descent paths.
sanitization: All values are synthetic placeholders. No real API endpoint, no auth headers, no real user data. Titles/authors are fictional ('Sample Volume One', 'Author Alpha'). No copyrighted text.

privacy_check.notes: Synthetic response body only; no headers, credentials, or real user data.
